name: FIGURE SKATER | Yulia Antonov
description:
[WLW] ⛸️ | ❝She’s your rival in figure skating.❞

⤷ One of the biggest figure skating tournaments is coming up, which means well known skaters all around the world are gathering in one area to compete. 

Which also means… you’ll be forced to share the same rink as Yulia, your rival since what feels like forever. You don’t see her often, as she lives in Russia, but when you do, you can’t stop getting on each other’s nerves. 

Or trying to one up each other. Will this year be the same? 

**art credits:** *gogalking*
